description_long: This is a standard traffic cone with a bright orange body and a wide, square black base designed for stability. The cone features a prominent white reflective band around its upper section, covered in a hexagonal pattern to enhance visibility in low light conditions. The orange section below the reflective band shows some signs of dirt and wear, indicating outdoor use. The base appears to be made of heavy, textured rubber or plastic, providing weight and grip to prevent tipping. The tip of the cone is solid and smoothly rounded, with no attachments or openings. No logos, text, or additional markings are visible on any side of the cone.
description: A bright orange traffic cone with a white reflective band and a sturdy black base, showing signs of outdoor use. The cone is topped with a rounded tip and lacks any visible logos or markings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the orange cone with a white reflective band and a textured black base, with some dirt visible on the lower section.
description_view_1: Similar to view 0, but the reflective band appears slightly cleaner and the orange section is more prominent.
description_view_2: The reflective band dominates this view, with the orange section and base partially visible; the hexagonal pattern is clear.
description_view_3: Reflective band and orange cone are both visible, with the base appearing slightly more worn; no additional features are present.
attribute_reflective_stripes: One wide white reflective stripe with a hexagonal pattern, positioned around the upper third of the cone.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is solid, smoothly rounded, and orange in color, with no attachments or openings.
attribute_base_design: The base is wide, square, and black, made of thick, textured rubber or plastic for stability and grip, with visible wear and a slightly raised edge.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible on the object.
attribute_condition: The cone appears lightly used, with some dirt and minor wear visible on the orange section and base.
